# MuleSoft Box Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (5.3) of Box Connector documentation.
> See [Box Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Box Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Box Connector 5.3 Additional Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/box-connector-config-topics.md)
- [Box Connector 5.3 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/box-connector-examples.md)
- [Box Connector Reference 5.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/box-connector-reference.md)
- [Configure Box Connector 5.3 Using Studio](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/box-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating Box Connector to Version 5.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/box-connector-upgrade.md)
- [Box 5.3 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/box-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Box Connector 5.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/box-connector/latest/index.md)
